alwaysShowHighlightsDescription.message: Display your saved highlights when you load a page. Turn off to only display highlights when highlighter mode is activated.

appendToDaily.message: Add to daily note, at the bottom

appendToExisting.message: Add to an existing note, at the bottom

clipBehaviorDescription.message: Choose how highlighted content is included in the Markdown clip. Defines the $strong_start${{content}}$strong_end$ variable.

confirmDeleteTemplate.message: Are you sure you want to delete the template "$1"?

confirmReplaceSettings.message: This will replace all your current settings, including templates and properties. Are you sure you want to continue?

defaultDestinationDescription.message: Choose where finished Markdown is delivered.

customUriTemplateDescription.message: Use {title} and {sourceUrl}. Markdown is copied to the clipboard before the URI opens. This setting is synchronized and included in settings exports. Never put secrets here.

destinationDeliveryFailed.message: Could not deliver this capture. Copy or download it instead.

localHttpOutcomeUnknown.message: Delivery result is unknown. Check the receiver before retrying.

localHttpEndpointDescription.message: Use a literal loopback address such as http://127.0.0.1:8765/captures. This setting is synchronized and included in settings exports. Never put secrets here.

localHttpTokenDescription.message: Stored only in this browser profile and excluded from settings sync and exports.

localHttpTokenSaveFailed.message: Could not save the access token. Use 16 to 512 visible characters without spaces.

localHttpTokenClearFailed.message: Could not clear the access token.

localHttpConnectionFailed.message: Connection failed. Check the endpoint and access token.

deleteAllHighlightsConfirm.message: Are you sure you want to delete all highlights?

deleteHighlightsForDomain.message: Delete all highlights for this domain?

deleteHighlightsForPage.message: Delete all highlights for this page?

enableHighlighterDescription.message: Highlight content on web pages and include it in your Markdown clips.

exportAllSettingsDescription.message: Export all settings including templates and properties.

exportHighlightsDescription.message: Export your highlights to a file.

exportPropertiesDescription.message: Save property definitions to a portable $strong_start$types.json$strong_end$ file for another Open Markdown Clipper installation.

extensionDescription.message: Capture web content as durable Markdown for clipboard, download, and local destinations.

failedToDeleteTemplate.message: Failed to delete template. Please try again.

failedToDuplicateTemplate.message: Failed to duplicate template. Please try again.

failedToExportHighlights.message: Failed to export highlights. Please check the console for more details.

failedToExportSettings.message: Failed to export settings. Please check the console for more details.

failedToImportTemplate.message: Error importing template. Please check the file and try again.

failedToResetTemplate.message: Failed to reset default template. Please try again.

feedbackDescription.message: How can we improve Web Clipper? Please visit our help page, where you can report bugs, suggest features, and get help with common issues.

helpDescription.message: Learn how to use Web Clipper and get help troubleshooting.

importAllSettingsDescription.message: Import all settings including templates and properties. This will replace your current configuration.

importFailed.message: Import failed. Please check the console for more details.

importPropertiesDescription.message: Import property definitions from a compatible $strong_1_start$types.json$strong_1_end$ file.

languageDescription.message: Choose the display language for the extension interface.

noTemplates.message: No templates available. Please add a template in the settings.

noteContentDescription.message: Customize the content of the note. Use variables to pre-populate data from the page.

noteLocationDescription.message: The folder or path of the note.

noteNameFormatDescription.message: Format the Markdown file name with page variables such as {{title}}, {{date}}, and {{published}}.

onlyHttpSupported.message: This page cannot be clipped. Only http and https URLs are supported.

openBehaviorDescription.message: Choose how Web Clipper opens by default.

prependToDaily.message: Add to daily note, at the top

prependToExisting.message: Add to an existing note, at the top

rateExtensionDescription.message: Are you enjoying Web Clipper? Help us by giving it a rating.

readerAutoScrollDescription.message: Automatically scroll the transcript to follow playback.

readerBlendImagesDescription.message: Blend images with the page background.

readerCustomCssDescription.message: CSS applied automatically in reading view. CSS can load remote resources and restyle Reader. Use only CSS and full settings imports you trust.

readerDarkThemeDescription.message: Use a different theme in dark mode.

readerFontDescription.message: Add fonts installed on your system. Press enter to add a font.

readerFontPlaceholder.message: Press enter to add a font

readerFontUnavailable.message: This font isn't available here — your browser may be blocking custom fonts.

readerHighlightActiveLineDescription.message: Highlight the current sentence in the transcript during playback.

readerLoadFailed.message: Failed to load. The page may be blocked by your browser.

readerPinPlayerDescription.message: Keep the video player visible while scrolling through the transcript.

readerThemeDescription.message: Choose the colors used in reading view.

removeUnusedPropertiesDescription.message: Remove all properties that are not used in any template.

resetDefaultTemplateDescription.message: Remove any changes you've made to the default template.

saveBehaviorDescription.message: Choose the default option for saving pages. Alternate options appear in the dropdown menu next to the main button.

selectTemplateToExport.message: Please select a template to export.

settingsImportSuccess.message: All settings imported successfully. Please refresh the page to see the changes.

shortcutInstructionsBrave.message: To change key assignments, go to $1

shortcutInstructionsChrome.message: To change key assignments, go to $1

shortcutInstructionsDefault.message: To change key assignments, please refer to your browser's extension settings.

shortcutInstructionsEdge.message: To change key assignments, go to $1

shortcutInstructionsFirefox.message: To change key assignments, go to $1, click the gear icon, and select "Manage Extension Shortcuts".

shortcutInstructionsIntro.message: Keyboard shortcuts give you quick access to clipper features.

shortcutInstructionsSafari.message: Keyboard shortcuts are not customizable on Safari.

showActionsDescription.message: Allows you to inspect page variables from the clipper menu. Useful for seeing the variables that are available to use in templates.

templateCopyError.message: Failed to copy template JSON to clipboard

templateErrorCount.message: There is an error in your template.

templateErrorsCount.message: There are $1 errors in your template.

templatePropertiesDescription.message: Properties to add to the top of the clipped note. Use variables to pre-populate data from the page.

templateTriggersDescription.message: Define rules to automatically select this template if it matches a URL pattern or contains schema.org data. One rule per line.

usingLatestVersion.message: You are using the latest version.
